(brother of anger).
  1. Son of Zadok the high priest in Davidï¿½s reign, and celebrated for his swiftness of foot. During Absalomï¿½s rebellion he carried to David the important intelligence that Ahithophel had counselled an immediate attack upon David and his followers. (2ï¿½Samuel 15:24-37; 17:15-22) Shortly afterwards he was the first to bring to the king the good news of Absalomï¿½s defeat. (2ï¿½Samuel 18:19-33) (B.C. 972-956.)
  2. Saulï¿½s wifeï¿½s father. (1ï¿½Samuel 14:50) (B.C. before 1093.)
